text: Artificial intelligence is rapidly changing the workplace, primarily through automation. Many routine tasks, such as data entry and scheduling, are now handled by AI. This allows employees to focus on more creative and strategic work. At the same time, productivity tools powered by AI help workers analyse information faster and make better decisions. Rather than replacing humans, the trend is toward human-AI collaboration. Employees work alongside AI systems, using their insights to improve results. Of course, these changes mean that some jobs will disappear or be transformed. However, new roles are also emerging, such as AI trainers and ethicists. Adapting to this shift requires a willingness to learn new skills and embrace technology as a partner.
